# Element

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/customElements`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/customElements/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DGUaHm48.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-element`
- `query-custom-elements-list`
- `query-presets-elements-list`
- `delete-element`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/general/custom-elements`
- `/v1/general/presets-elements`
- `/v1/general/delete-elements`
